name: seesaw
description: Vendored core of Adafruit's seesaw library (Adafruit_seesaw only). Upstream declares a dependency on 'Adafruit ST7735 and ST7789 Library', which in turn pulls in arduino-libraries/SD. That SD build is AVR-only and, once in libdeps, shadows the ESP32 core's own SD library and breaks the build. No seesaw source file includes ST7735 or SD -- only its examples do -- so the core is vendored here with an honest dependency list. Upstream: https://github.com/adafruit/Adafruit_Seesaw (BSD).
